# Shopline API Endpoint Inventory

This inventory is the local coverage fixture for the TypeScript MCP tool map.
It lists normalized method/path pairs that should be covered by tool metadata.

## Endpoints

- DELETE /v1/affiliate_campaigns/{id}
- DELETE /v1/categories/{id}
- DELETE /v1/customers/{id}
- DELETE /v1/flash_price_campaigns/{id}
- DELETE /v1/pos/purchase_orders
- DELETE /v1/product_review_comments
- DELETE /v1/product_review_comments/{id}
- DELETE /v1/products/{id}
- DELETE /v1/products/{id}/images
- DELETE /v1/products/{id}/variations/{id}
- DELETE /v1/promotions/{id}
- GET /v1/addon_products
- GET /v1/addon_products/search

- GET /v1/affiliate_campaigns/{id}
- GET /v1/affiliate_campaigns/{id}/order_usage

- GET /v1/categories/{id}
